title: Obtain LB broth medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9kl57","text":"LB broth medium is a basic culture media for microorganisms. This protocol helps make an ordinary LB broth medium.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 25 g LB broth powder in 1000 mL distilled water.
Autoclave the medium. Use autoclave safely.
creator: An.Huang
